case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. VS. RICARDO ANTONIO LOPEZ BALTODANO

docket_entries.description: REMARK: FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON MAY 29, 2024 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.

SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR - JOSE PALACIOS.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-15-2012 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONA;D S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
